port_note: TWS paper default. IB Gateway paper would typically use 4002, but Phase 2A default is TWS paper.
client_id_note: Execution client_id NESMI kolidovat s GDU/MDSM-Lite client_id z jeho configu ani s MDSM-Lite/scripts/test_ibkr_connection.py (99). Dve session se stejnym id se navzajem vykopnou.
expected_account_id_note: POVINNE doplnit rucne ID paper uctu (typicky zacina DU...). Connection test FAILne, dokud je prazdne.
